title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・緊急コード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun loses to Narita Brian, but
realizes there is something else Narita Brian is
searching for—something separate from the
results of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious to discover what it is Narita Brian desires,
Mayano Top Gun wants to race against her again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when she hears from Hishi Amazon that
Narita Brian is not planning on racing again after
the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vowing to become a racer capable of exciting
even Narita Brian, she sets her sights on the G1
race in which the best racers compete—the
Takarazuka Kinen.
